SEARCH
Module com.example.chermn
Package com.example.chermn.controller

Class BaseProfileController

java.lang.Object
com.example.chermn.controller.BaseController
com.example.chermn.controller.BaseProfileController
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProfileController, TeacherParentHomescreenController
public abstract class BaseProfileController extends BaseController
Controller for the base profiles screens. Handles the base profile functionalities, such as displaying screens, changing passwords, and signing out.

  • Field Details

    • userDAO

      protected com.example.chermn.dao.UserDAO userDAO
      Instantiates the database to allow access.

      protected Users user
      Defines the variable for the current, logged-in user.

      public BaseProfileController()

  • Method Details

    • getContainer

      protected abstract javafx.scene.layout.StackPane getContainer()
      Abstract method that gets the type of StackPane used
      Returns:
      the container type

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initialises the controller before the screen is displayed. Sets the user as the current logged-in user stored in Session.

    • loadView

      public void loadView(String fxml)
      Loads the different screens corresponding to the type of user.
      Parameters:
      fxml - the string format of the fxml file for the profile screen.

    • changePasswordButtonClick

      protected void changePasswordButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Handles the change password button click. Loads the specific profile screen depending on the current user's type.
      Parameters:
      event - the action event generated by clicking the change password button.

    • signOutButtonClick

      protected void signOutButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Handles the sign-out button click. Loads the onboarding screen to allow the user to sign back in, or create new account.
      Parameters:
      event - the action event generated by clicking the sign-out button.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the sign-out event is not allowed.
